name: Moncayo
intro_text: On the eastern seacoast of Puerto Rico lies Moncayo Golf & Ocean Club, an extraordinary private residential community that unites stunning natural beauty, ultra-premium residences, high-end amenities, and a vibrant community.

Moncayo offers an exclusive lifestyle where members embrace wellness, adventure, and connection through a world-class athletic club, championship golf, private island access, and memorable social experiences.

experiences.title: 18 Holes of pure natural beauty
experiences.text: Experience the joy of a private, 18-hole championship golf course by MacKenzie & Ebert, offering an immersive experience through lush valleys, dramatic ridges, and stunning coastal bluffs.

experiences.title: Adventure awaits
experiences.text: Adventure awaits on land and sea, with expert-led rainforest treks, mountain exploration, island hopping through the Virgin Islands, kiteboarding, e-foiling, and fly fishing.

experiences.title: Reconnect and reinvigorate
experiences.text: Offering hot and cold plunges, therapeutic massages, steam baths, saunas, and an individualized approach to wellness engineering.

residences_text: Homes at Moncayo are crafted to inspire wellness and harmony, and to foster a balanced lifestyle.

name: Territory 1889
intro_text: Anchored by a Tom Fazio-designed 18-hole golf course and 9-hole short course, a 15-acre lake club, and a marina, Territory 1889 is a destination for those who crave connection—with the outdoors, with their families, and with something bigger than themselves.

Days here unfold between the lake club and the trailhead, the pool deck and the putting green. With curated dining, well-being, and outdoor pursuits, it's a place where luxury lives easy—and where Montana's wild beauty is always just outside your door.

experiences.title: An 18-hole mountain masterpiece
experiences.text: While respectful of the game, golf here is different. It's unhurried and unbothered. No strict dress codes, tee times, or even shoes are required. Play however you like.

experiences.title: Wild outdoor adventures
experiences.text: Discovery's signature outdoor adventure and recreation program, provides the expertise, guidance, equipment, and access to create incredible experiences for your family.

experiences.title: Recharge in nature
experiences.text: Territory 1889's comprehensive well-being program combines cutting-edge technology with time-honored methodologies to empower our members to take charge of their holistic health.

residences_text: Golf barefoot overlooking the lake. Enjoy a healthy, flavorful feast with friends. Rejuvenate your mind, body, and soul at our cutting-edge fitness and well-being facility.

name: Discovery Dunes
intro_text: Private and secluded, yet only a short drive to the city center of Dubai, Discovery Dunes is Dubai's first private golf residential community for families of all generations. Its welcoming, family-oriented lifestyle is effortlessly elegant and filled with moments of light-hearted fun and adventure.

experiences.title: Endless experiences
experiences.text: Discovery's signature recreational service connects families with the fun and adventure that Discovery Dunes has to offer.

experiences.title: Private Tom Fazio golf
experiences.text: The golf club showcases a meticulously designed 18-hole private course by renowned architect Tom Fazio.

experiences.title: Wellness in the Dunes
experiences.text: Well-being will be a major focus of the lifestyle and ethos at Discovery Dunes.

residences_text: Discovery Dunes' offers home and homesite layouts that preserve views and protect privacy while offering an estate ambiance to homeowners.

listing.name: Estate Land Plot 95
listing.location: Discovery Dunes, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

name: CostaTerra
intro_text: Located just over an hour from Lisbon, CostaTerra spans 720 acres of preserved land on the Alentejo coast, boasting nearly a mile of beachfront. Amenities include an 18-hole Tom Fazio golf course, a club village with multiple dining venues using local organic produce, our signature Outdoor Pursuits program, and luxurious residences—all designed for families to spend quality time together.

experiences.title: Elevate your game
experiences.text: Designed by Tom Fazio, the golf course at CostaTerra is a true membership-based masterpiece. It is among Europe's most exhilarating and challenging tests of golf.

experiences.title: Outdoor Pursuits
experiences.text: Our Outdoor Pursuits team will keep you safe as you push your limits, take on new skills, and have fun, creating endless opportunities for play, exploration and learning.

experiences.title: Reconnect and reinvigorate
experiences.text: True wellness is about balance in all areas of life. It means nourishing and strengthening your body with nutritious food and thoughtful movement.

residences_text: CostaTerra Golf & Ocean Club offers a wide range of real estate options, from large estate homesites to turnkey club residences and custom luxury homes. The combination of an unmatched environmentally thoughtful setting, family-focused experience-based lifestyle, and true exclusivity makes ownership here one of the rarest opportunities in Europe.

name: Mohala
intro_text: Mohala's exceptional location in Ward Village enjoys sweeping views of the island's magnificent coastline and iconic Diamond Head, and offers residents unfettered access to world-class shopping, dining, and entertainment around the community. Whether you're drawn to O‘ahu's world-class waves, stunning sunsets, or cultural experiences, Mohala's central location ensures easy access to everything the island has to offer.

name: Crazy Mountain Ranch
intro_text: Set across 18,000 acres of Montana wilderness, Crazy Mountain Ranch combines authentic Western heritage with unmatched outdoor recreation. An Old Western Town anchors the ranch, with 20 historic buildings and restored guest accommodations, surrounded by 80 miles of trails, a 24-acre lake, ziplining, shooting, and championship golf. A secluded year-round Montana escape for families, groups, and gatherings.

experiences.title: Open-range adventure
experiences.text: Hike to alpine lakes, cast on private waters, ride horseback across open range, or head into the hills for upland bird and big game. For those who enjoy wide-open spaces, there's no shortage of ways to enjoy them.

experiences.title: A Coore & Crenshaw original
experiences.text: The new walkable 18-hole golf course and 14-hole par-3 course, designed by Bill Coore & Ben Crenshaw, will be exceptional in every regard.

experiences.title: Ranch life
experiences.text: A working ranch that preserves the spirit and traditions of the Old West, rooted in authentic Western heritage.

residences_text: Membership in the Club at Crazy Mountain Ranch is limited and being offered by invitation only. While there is no for-sale real estate at CMR, the property puts 18,000 acres of Montana working cattle ranch, private golf, and full-service club within reach through a simple membership structure. Please contact us for more information.

name: Barbuda
intro_text: Located in the heart of the West Indies, Barbuda Ocean Club is where families live simply, pursue passions, and create lifelong memories. Escape to the ultimate Caribbean hideaway, where pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and a hidden paradise awaits. Spanning over 900 acres, Barbuda Ocean Club features world-class beach clubs and lifestyle amenities, an 18-hole Tom Fazio golf course, the Caribbean's best Outdoor Pursuits program, and a distinctive collection of luxury real estate.

experiences.title: A beautiful game
experiences.text: Tom Fazio's expert touch is on full display, offering a mix of scenic and challenging holes set among the natural seaside dunes and dramatic coastline of Barbuda.

experiences.title: Nature's playground
experiences.text: With 62 square miles to explore above and below the water line, you'll never run short of adventure in Barbuda.

experiences.title: Live well
experiences.text: Barbuda inspires greater balance and a strong commitment to wellness, nutrition, and fitness. Our beach clubs provide many opportunities to create an active and healthy lifestyle.

residences_text: Barbuda Ocean Club offers modern Caribbean living with a distinctive collection of custom homesites, turnkey casitas, waterfront cottages, golf villas, and beachfront estates.

name: El Dorado
intro_text: Spend the days at El Dorado however you please. Play a round of championship golf on the impressive Jack Nicklaus-designed course; experience gourmet cuisine sourced from our organic farms; enjoy a multitude of outdoor activities, day spa and fitness facilities, complete with recreational and lifestyle concierge teams.

experiences.title: World-class golf
experiences.text: The spectacular 18-hole course links the coast to the desert for an unforgettable round.

experiences.title: Extraordinary adventures
experiences.text: Explore a myriad of outdoor activities on both land and sea guided by world-class professionals.

experiences.title: Reconnect with the environment
experiences.text: Leave the stresses of everyday life behind and discover the therapuetic touch of El Dorado's spa and wellness facilities.

residences_text: Spread across 520 acres, El Dorado offers unparralled living with an exclusive collection of carefully selected custom homesites from 1/3 to a full acre, along with existing casitas and villas from 2-7 bedrooms, all with remarkable views.

name: Tenuta Toscana
intro_text: Just moments from Florence and Pisa sits Tenuta Toscana, a unique Italian retreat that transports you beyond the expected. Create unforgettable memories as you explore centuries-old borgos, savor sensational wines with refined yet rustic cuisine, and play world-class golf in the idyllic Italian countryside. Here, Italy's enduring allure comes to life with modern luxury in a locale that sets your soul at ease and immerses your family in a world of vibrant art and culture.

experiences.title: Play among the pines
experiences.text: Set against one of the most beautiful landscapes in the world, Tenuta Toscana's 18-hole championship course is Tom Fazio at his finest.

experiences.title: A taste of Tuscany
experiences.text: Across 61 acres of organic vineyards and 10,000 olive trees, the estate produces wines and olive oils that reflect the richness of the land and the care behind it.

experiences.title: Endless outdoor adventures
experiences.text: Adventures at Tenuta Toscana move with the rhythm of the seasons, inviting members to explore the beauty of the land.

residences_text: Scattered across the hills of the estate, beautiful ancient farmhouse ruins stand ready to be brought back to life — their stone walls and terracotta roofs holding the stories of centuries past.

name: Zapotal
intro_text: Set on the northwest Pacific coast of Costa Rica, Zapotal encompasses 2,000 acres of beachfront surrounded by wild and vibrant nature. Rural yet refined, Zapotal embodies a family-focused, adventurous lifestyle.

The community is surrounded by a towering dry tropical forest, where colorful birds, frolicking monkeys, and other rare animals swing from branch to branch, soar from tree to tree, and live in a state of infinite adventure. Zapotal finds inspiration in this natural expression of pura vida and takes every opportunity to bring that indescribable feeling to you and your family.

experiences.title: A hole-in-one experience
experiences.text: Inspired by the natural beauty of the Costa Rican landscape, Zapotal's golf course has been designed for both beginners and experts alike.

experiences.title: A wild family adventure
experiences.text: Experience unforgettable moments, push boundaries, and embark on new adventures with every member of the family as you explore the beauty of Costa Rica in comfort and safety.

experiences.title: Wellness habitat in harmony
experiences.text: With decades of experience building luxury communities in some of the world's most stunning environments, Discovery is proud to create a conscious, sustainable community that respects the natural world.

residences_text: Zapotal blends luxury living with a relaxed, family-friendly atmosphere. Choose from a selection of custom-designed homes, homesites, casitas, and cottages ranging from 2 to 7 bedrooms in a variety of settings.

name: Maverick
intro_text: At Maverick Golf & Ranch Club, every aspect of an easeful life is thoughtfully planned and impeccably designed. We're bringing together the wild spirit of old-world Texas with the contemporary elegance of modern living. Here, families can experience Fort Worth's rich heritage as they explore life on the land during the day and return home to a 5-star meal in the evening.

experiences.title: Golf
experiences.text: The club's golf experience will be anything but traditional, creating a one-of-a-kind golfer's oasis in Dallas-Fort Worth.

experiences.title: Outdoor Pursuits
experiences.text: Maverick Golf & Ranch Club's Outdoor Pursuits team will provide everything your family requires to explore the fun and adventure of Dallas Fort-Worth in true Texan spirit.

experiences.title: Wellness
experiences.text: Maverick Golf & Ranch Club delivers the ultimate holistic approach to true well-being for the whole family.

residences_text: At Maverick Golf & Ranch Club, every aspect of an easeful life is thoughtfully planned and impeccably designed. Here, highly personalized service is combined with world-class amenities to create the most unforgettable stay.

name: Austin Surf
intro_text: Austin Surf is a one-of-a-kind surf lifestyle residential community where cutting-edge technology and classic surf culture converge. Embracing the adventurous spirit of Austin, Texas and bringing the joy of surfing to your front door.

In a groundbreaking partnership between Ansari Sami and legendary surfer Kelly Slater, Austin Surf aims to redefine residential living by offering a 2,200 ft long surf basin equipped with state-of-the-art high-volume wave technology – a canvas for surfers of all ages and skill levels to perfect their craft.

experiences.title: The heart of the club
experiences.text: Surf is where it all begins. At Austin Surf Club, the wave is the foundation of the community, delivering variety, consistency, and progression that keeps surfers coming back.

experiences.title: Adventure awaits beyond the wave
experiences.text: Outdoor Pursuits are a defining element of the lifestyle, inspired by the signature approach found across Ansari Sami properties.

experiences.title: Lifestyle grounded in ease
experiences.text: The premier amenities, as our clubhouse serves as a natural hub for gathering, whether for post surf meals, casual conversation, or evenings that stretch longer than planned.

residences_text: With just 178 private residences dispersed across more than 240 acres, Austin Surf is a one-of-a-kind legacy community your family will cherish for generations.

name: Atlantic Fields
intro_text: Atlantic Fields is a private residential community that brings to life the natural grace and simple charm of old Florida. Set amidst Hobe Sound's pristine natural beauty, this luscious enclave captures the essence of luxury Southern Florida living.
Less than 30 minutes from Palm Beach International Airport, Atlantic Fields is conveniently reached from nearly any place in North America or Western Europe.

experiences.title: Elevate your game
experiences.text: Our Tom Fazio course winds its way through the property's lake and canal systems with beautiful mature landscaping that blends gracefully within the natural environment.

experiences.title: Unforgettable experiences
experiences.text: Atlantic Fields has a fresh, adventurous spirit that just loves to get outside and play.

experiences.title: At home in paradise
experiences.text: Atlantic Fields captures the heart and soul of South Florida. It's laidback and welcoming, deeply connected to nature and filled with moments of easy grace and simple elegance.

name: The Hills
intro_text: Nestled among majestic pine forests, The Hills is where unforgettable moments are magically uncovered rather than chased. Adventure finds you, rather than the other way around.

experiences.title: Golf with a twist
experiences.text: The Hills provides its owners with the opportunity for private world-class golf within their own community.

experiences.title: A wellness retreat
experiences.text: With its serene natural beauty and tranquil atmosphere, The Hills offers a great backdrop for wellness activities.

experiences.title: An outdoor adventure playground
experiences.text: With property ownership at The Hills, your family will create forever memories through diverse experiences.

residences_text: Nestled within the natural landscape, our Discovery-designed residences and custom homesites offer a seamless blend of luxury and tranquility.

listing.name: Village Home 87
listing.location: The Hills, East Quogue, New York

name: Naples Beach Club
intro_text: With impeccable beaches, a championship golf course, unparalleled culinary delights, and family-friendly activities, Naples Beach Club offers members a place to call home, where they can escape the day-to day and reconnect with loved ones.

experiences.title: Golf reimagined
experiences.text: Our plush and pristine 18-hole golf course allows for year-round practice and play.

experiences.title: Unforgettable outdoor adventures
experiences.text: Explore a broad program of outdoor adventures and excursions, on both water and land, guided by Southwest Florida's seasoned outdoor enthusiasts.

experiences.title: Luxury beachside living
experiences.text: Life at Naples Beach Club exceeds all expectations of a beachfront retreat.

residences_text: Naples Beach Club's limited collection of private residences feature both Beachside and Golfside Residences, offering Gulf-front living along Naples' most treasured white sand beaches.

name: Homewood
intro_text: Homewood embodies the perfect pace of life, where you can spend your days just how you like. Meet with a trainer while your kids learn to paddleboard with the Outdoor Pursuits team on the lake or experience culinary bliss dining lakeside on the pier.

experiences.title: An adventure wonderland
experiences.text: This natural wonderland means endless adventures all within reach – get out and go play.

experiences.title: Skiing
experiences.text: The mountain is a way of life for skiiers of all abilities.

experiences.title: Wellness
experiences.text: Unwind surrounded by nature and experience the magic of Homewood.

name: North Shore Preserve
intro_text: Blissfully low-key, spectacularly secluded, at North Shore Preserve you will fully embrace island life. Here, every day is a magical mystery tour of the natural world.

experiences.title: Island-style golf
experiences.text: Golf can be a leisurely game played barefoot between comfort stations stocked with mai tais and ahi burgers.

experiences.title: Well-being at Hale Huna
experiences.text: From revitalizing practices like SuperPool training paired with contrast therapy, wellness is woven into every amenity.

experiences.title: Island adventures
experiences.text: Outdoor Pursuits brings nature closer than ever before. The surf will be your companion.

residences_text: Your home at North Shore Preserve will be one with the island. A part of the ecosystem, where horses wander, fences are low-profile, and homes sit comfortably in the landscape.

name: Playa Grande
intro_title: In the heart of the Caribbean
intro_text: Playa Grande Golf & Ocean Club has developed organically over time, adapting its offerings and culture to reflect its growing membership and natural setting. Its landscape features seven miles of coastline with golden beaches, picturesque coves, and dramatic headlands.

experiences.title: Elevate your game
experiences.text: Though rugged, raw, and natural, golf at Playa Grande is an elevated experience. Discovery invented the on-course comfort station and perfected it at Playa Grande.

experiences.title: Locally inspired flavors
experiences.text: From the laidback ease of Pare's Place to the perfectly grilled steaks and seafood of Las Brasas, and the breathtaking views from The Point.

experiences.title: Explore your way
experiences.text: Race through the jungle in a UTV. Dive to a historic shipwreck just offshore or fly high above the beach on a zipline.

residences_text: Playa Grande offers a wide range of residential options to meet the individual needs of our member families.

listing.name: Western Cliff Estate #1
listing.location: Playa Grande, Rio San Juan, Dominican Republic

name: Taymouth Castle
intro_text: Just south of the Grampian Mountains, Taymouth Castle is a unique golf and sport club community that encompasses 7,775 majestic acres of Perthshire County's rolling green mountains, lush pastures, and glistening waterways.
Taymouth Castle stands as a prominent landmark in the picturesque Scottish countryside, originally built in the 19th century, towering above the remnants of its predecessor from 1550.

experiences.title: The world's most historic tee time
experiences.text: Golf at Taymouth transcends mere sport, offering an extraordinary journey through meticulously designed fairways, majestic moorland views.

experiences.title: A Scottish wonderland
experiences.text: Taymouth is a haven for Outdoor enthusiasts, from clay shooting and archery to scenic hiking trails and tranquil loch retreats.

experiences.title: Flavours of the highlands
experiences.text: Taymouth's culinary flavours are influenced by its local farm-to-table culture and extensive coastline.

residences_text: Luxuriously appointed and steeped in history, Taymouth Castle is the latest Ansari Sami community in Europe, poised to become one of the finest residential communities in Scotland.

name: Yellowstone Club
intro_text: Expert or novice skiers will enjoy the 2,700 acres of crispy powder-drenched trails of world-class skiing with more than 100 runs, golfers of all skills will play the 18-hole Tom Weiskopf-designed golf course in the summer, and adventurers of all kinds will embark on mountain exploration with our Outdoor Pursuits program.

experiences.title: Fun for every season
experiences.text: The Outdoor Pursuits team at Yellowstone Club thoughtfully curates unforgettable experiences designed to inspire exploration across every season.

experiences.title: World-class golf
experiences.text: Set high in the mountains, the 18 hole Tom Weiskopf-designed golf course showcases soaring peaks, open fairways.

experiences.title: The mountain life
experiences.text: The attraction of skiing at Yellowstone Club lies in a rare balance of privacy, scale, and community.

residences_text: Yellowstone Club offers a wide range of family-friendly mountain homes, from spacious modern ranches to custom residences offering distinct architectural designs.

name: James Island
intro_title: Play in a magical wooded wonderland
intro_text: Comprised of an entirely private 790-acre island in the Southern Gulf Islands of British Columbia, James Island blends comfortable luxury and comprehensive amenities in an enchanting, secluded wilderness.

experiences.title: Golf for the senses
experiences.text: With a stunning blend of ocean and forest holes, a round of golf at James Island will invigorate and engage all the senses.

experiences.title: Adventure to the Pacific Northwest
experiences.text: Discovery's signature concierge outdoor program will be your gateway to experiencing the Pacific Northwest.

experiences.title: Healing in nature
experiences.text: Ground yourself in nature with luxury amenities surrounded by an enchanting evergreen forest.

residences_text: Limited to less than 80 custom homesites, each with dazzling forest and ocean views, James Island is one of Discovery's most exquisite and exclusive communities.

name: Troubadour
intro_text: Nestled in the gentle, rolling countryside just outside Nashville, Troubadour Golf and Field Club is an intimate, members‑only residential community where days are filled with laughter, connection, and unforgettable moments with those you love.

Nashville is known as the 'birthplace' of country music, an artistic haven for musicians and music lovers alike. At Troubadour, you'll find unmatched amenities and activities that celebrate this local heritage.

experiences.title: Life at Troubadour
experiences.text: World‑class amenities and thoughtfully curated programs harmonize with the interests of every member of your household.

experiences.title: Golf tradition redefined
experiences.text: World‑renowned golf course architect Tom Fazio crafted Troubadour's stunning 18‑hole championship course.

experiences.title: A playground for everyone
experiences.text: Jump into a friendly game of whiffle ball, enjoy a relaxing canoe ride with friends, or head to the field to sharpen your archery and skeet‑shooting skills.

name: Driftwood
intro_text: Set in the rolling hills of Texas, Driftwood Golf & Ranch Club is 800 magnificent acres of Texas as you've always imagined it. Rural and refined, Driftwood embodies your vision of a family-forward hill country lifestyle.

experiences.title: 18-hole Tom Fazio golf
experiences.text: The course welcomes both the novice and expert golfer with signature comfort stations.

experiences.title: Escape outside
experiences.text: Our recreation concierge program assists members in discovering endless opportunities for unforgettable outdoor adventures.

experiences.title: A taste of Texas
experiences.text: Harvesting sustainable produce from the on-site organic farms, Driftwood will offer a wealth of dining opportunities the whole family will love.

residences_title: Your Perfect Residence in the Hill Country
residences_text: Driftwood Golf & Ranch Club blends luxury living with a relaxed family-friendly atmosphere. Choose from a selection of villas, cabins, and bungalows ranging from 4–5 bedrooms.

name: Chileno Bay Club
intro_text: With a mountainous backdrop and endless ocean views, Chileno Bay Club is one of the most picturesque settings in the world. Immerse yourself in Mexico's serene lifestyle.

experiences.title: Championship golf course
experiences.text: Enjoy a golf experience like no other on our Tom Fazio-designed championship course.

experiences.title: Ocean and land pursuits
experiences.text: The Outdoor Pursuits team is here to help you and your family experience all Cabo has to offer.

experiences.title: Elevate your mind
experiences.text: The Beach Club's fitness center and spa offer a spectacular setting for members to enjoy an intense exercise session.

residences_text: Chileno Bay offers a variety of residences with beautiful ocean frontage and views. From custom homes to turnkey residences.

listing.name: Hillside Villa 22PH
listing.location: Chileno Bay Club, Los Cabos, Mexico

name: Madison
intro_text: A sophisticated private residential community in La Quinta, The Madison Club is a modern interpretation of California's old-time country clubs; a place of effortless grace and charm, with a limited number of luxury homes and memberships available.

experiences.title: Tom Fazio golf
experiences.text: Golf at Madison is an unmatched experience for even the most seasoned golfer.

experiences.title: Escape outside
experiences.text: To discover Coachella Valley's recreational opportunities, look no further than the breathtaking natural treasure surrounding Madison.

experiences.title: A tranquil sanctuary
experiences.text: The Spa & Wellness program encourages members to explore new avenues to obtain optimal health and well-being.

residences_text: Madison's quiet neighborhoods of luxury estate residences, elegant villas, and clubhouse suites offer an air of understated luxury and charm.

name: Summit
intro_text: Discover a 600-acre sanctuary at Summit Club. Nestled between Red Rock Canyon National Conservation Area and the Las Vegas Strip, Summit Club is the only private residential lifestyle club community in Las Vegas.

experiences.title: A course masterpiece
experiences.text: This unique 18-hole golf course will challenge and delight players of all abilities and is seamlessly integrated into the rugged mountain backdrop of Red Rock Canyon.

experiences.title: Fun for all ages
experiences.text: Discovery's signature Outdoor Pursuits program is designed to help you safely explore all that this spectacular environment has to offer.

experiences.title: Luxury lifestyle in the desert
experiences.text: Situated between the exceptional entertainment venues and the untouched wilderness of the Southern Nevada desert.

residences_text: Choose from a collection of refined club luxury residences and suites or custom estate lots for your personal dream home.

name: Hideaway
intro_text: Hideaway Golf Club embodies the best qualities of the Coachella Valley and more. Both luxurious and private, it sits on 600 acres with dramatic vistas of the Santa Rosa Mountains as its backdrop.

experiences.title: Tee off on the world-class golf course
experiences.text: Enjoy not one but two stunning 18-hole courses–one designed by Clive Clark and the other by Pete Dye.

experiences.title: Adventure awaits
experiences.text: From desert exploration to curated local experiences, Hideaway makes it effortless to enjoy the best of the Coachella Valley.

experiences.title: Wellness in the desert
experiences.text: Well-being is at the heart of The Hideaway lifestyle with a full-service spa inspired by the world's finest retreats.

name: Estancia
intro_title: A once in a lifetime opportunity
intro_text: Located on the northern slope of Pinnacle Peak, Scottsdale's famed landmark, The Estancia Club is a luxurious members-only residential community sprawled across 640 acres. An internationally renowned, Tom Fazio-designed 18-hole championship course features pristine greens with sweeping vista views.

name: Mirabel
intro_text: Choose from a lively party, a low-key get together with friends, or a round of leisurely golf or tennis – you're never far from fun at Mirabel. Our 38,000 square foot Desert Lodge Clubhouse offers ambience, activities, service, and dining with incredible mountain views.

name: Gozzer Ranch
intro_title: A rustic retreat in the heart of Idaho
intro_text: Perched atop a series of basalt rock bluffs, and overlooking Lake Coeur d'Alene, Gozzer Ranch provides all the comforts of the world's finest private clubs, but with the style and relaxed pace of classic, small-town Americana.
Gozzer Ranch offers the perfect setting for living life to its fullest amid the grandeur and undisturbed beauty of the great Northwest.

experiences.title: Championship caliber golf
experiences.text: Our 18-hole golf course accentuates the innate beauty and dramatic landscape of Gozzer Ranch.

experiences.title: In pursuit of adventure
experiences.text: Lake Coeur d'Alene is a playground for water enthusiasts and the center of life at Gozzer Ranch.

experiences.title: An opportunity to exhale
experiences.text: Unwind and reset the body with a personalized spa treatment or an endorphin-boosting workout session.

residences_text: The majority of the homesites and residences enjoy spectacular lake, mountain, and golf course views. Residential options include 267 custom homesites, 34 detached cabins, 28 homestead cottage homes, and 28 waterfront condominium lodge homes.

name: Iron Horse
intro_text: Escape to the mountains at Iron Horse Golf Club, located in beautiful Whitefish, Montana. This year-round residential community is minutes away from the Glacier National Park.

experiences.title: Spectacular mountainside golf
experiences.text: Enjoy a round of golf with stunning backdrops of the Montana Rockies and Whitefish Lake at nearly every hole.

experiences.title: Adventures for all ages
experiences.text: A robust blend of land and water sports ensures members can fill their days with endless outdoor adventures.

experiences.title: Your family's ideal private mountain retreat
experiences.text: Days at Iron Horse are best spent with loved ones, and should be as relaxing as they are rejuvenating.

name: Vaquero
intro_title: A world away from the day-to-day
intro_text: Vaquero Golf Club is a beautiful and peaceful property set across 525 acres of rolling terrain in the stunning landscape in North Texas. This private community features 300 residences designed for families to create everlasting memories together.

experiences.title: A defining experience
experiences.text: In fall 2023, Vaquero unveiled its reimagined 18-hole course, complemented by two refined amenity buildings and a new starter house.

experiences.title: Outdoor adventures
experiences.text: At Vaquero, the outdoors is where members connect—fishing at Fish Camp, exploring nature, and creating lasting family memories.

experiences.title: The Club
experiences.text: At the club, everyday life feels elevated—gather with friends, spend time with family, and enjoy a setting that feels like home.

name: Mountaintop
intro_text: Surround yourself in nature's beautiful untouched lakes and cascading waterfalls while you play golf on a championship Tom-Fazio designed course. Challenge the kids to a game of tennis or unwind in the world-class spa and salon at the luxurious lodge style clubhouse.

experiences.title: Elevated Golf
experiences.text: Set high in the Blue Ridge Mountains, each hole reveals sweeping views and a course that rewards both precision and creativity.

experiences.title: Club Life
experiences.text: At Mountaintop, the club is where it all comes together—easy mornings, time with family, and a community that feels both welcoming and refined.

experiences.title: Court Play
experiences.text: Well-appointed courts invite play at any pace—whether refining your game or enjoying time with family and friends.

name: Baker's Bay
intro_text: Baker's Bay Golf and Ocean Club is the Bahamas' most exclusive, members-only club community. Spacious. Opulent. It features a Tom Fazio-designed golf course, 6 and a half majestic miles of sugar-white beach, epic cuisine from our own organic farms, a world-class spa, and luxurious residences.

experiences.title: Designed for optimum play
experiences.text: The Tom Fazio-designed golf course at Baker's Bay has been designed for optimum play and caters to a variety of skill levels.

experiences.title: Adventures on land and sea
experiences.text: The Outdoor Pursuits team will help you make the most of your stay at Baker's Bay.

experiences.title: Luxury meets wellness
experiences.text: Expend as much or as little energy as you please. Sip a cocktail on the beach, enjoy an intimate spa treatment.

residences_text: In keeping with the relaxed, unburdened nature of life on the islands, Ansari Sami makes the prospect of owning property and building a home at Baker's Bay an enjoyable and easy experience.

name: Silo Ridge
intro_text: Tucked in the charming town of Amenia, Silo Ridge Field Club is a scenic, members-only community with under 300 residences. It features a Tom Fazio golf course and offers a range of sports, wellness, and outdoor activities.
Just under two hours from New York City, this private community sits across 850 acres of idyllic countryside in the Hudson Valley, Amenia.

experiences.title: A course masterpiece
experiences.text: Enjoy a round of golf enhanced by exquisite views of the Taconic Mountains and replenish your stamina at our signature comfort stations.

experiences.title: Ride like a pro
experiences.text: Horseback riding is a skill of focus, connection, and constant balance.

experiences.title: Adventure, your way
experiences.text: Explore endless play in pristine outdoor settings. Develop new skills at our archery course.

residences_text: With five distinct offerings, Silo Ridge Field Club offers real estate opportunities ranging from luxurious homes that reflect the area's equestrian aesthetic to custom lots.

name: Dune Deck
intro_text: While away the hours and breathe in the sea air at our exclusive beach club. Overlook the Atlantic Ocean from the cherry pink and green cabanas, embark on an adventure with our Outdoor Pursuits team; or simply relax and enjoy the exquisite food of our Michelin-starred chef.

experiences.title: Well-being, redefined
experiences.text: Experience elevated spa treatments designed to relax, renew, and rejuvenate as the ocean breeze cools the summer air.

experiences.title: Make every day a beach day
experiences.text: Sun-kissed skin, salty air, and sandy toes make for a perfect summer by the sea.

experiences.title: Ocean delights
experiences.text: The Hamptons is a premier destination for fine-dining and elevated fare.

name: CordeValle
intro_text: A stunning golf resort in Northern California, CordeValle emerges from the golden foothills of the Santa Cruz mountain range. The keystone of the club is its 18-hole championship golf course, designed by legendary golf architect Robert Trent Jones Jr. The course pays homage to the stunning natural landscape, incorporating creeks, sycamore trees, canyons, and sweeping meadows.

name: Kūki'o
intro_text: Enjoy an easy, relaxed lifestyle that is as much about indoor living as outdoor enjoyment. It features a Tom Fazio-designed golf course nestled into the Hualālai Mountain with a world-class clubhouse where members can enjoy an open-air bar and dining pavilion.

experiences.title: Championship golf
experiences.text: An 18-hole championship course and a 10-hole short course offer sweeping ocean views.

experiences.title: One with the ocean
experiences.text: Explore the hidden treasures of Hawai'i's Big Island as you canoe, sail, surf, and swim your way through the sapphire waters.

experiences.title: Reconnecting with nature
experiences.text: The spa and fitness facilities combine the healing powers of nature with world-class features.

name: Mākena
intro_text: A Maui dreamscape of 1,800 acres spanning from the golden sands and turquoise ocean to the leeward slopes of Haleakalā, Mākena Golf & Beach Club is a members-only residential community.
A picturesque golf and beach community nestled on Maui's southern shore, Mākena boasts breathtaking ocean views, stunning mountain landscapes, and immaculate crescent-shaped sandy beaches.

experiences.title: Elevate your game
experiences.text: Play the round of your life on Mākena's private 18-hole course surrounded by lush landscaping.

experiences.title: Explore your way
experiences.text: Head out into the blue for a sailing trip to Molokini Crater, enjoy snorkeling and scuba diving outings.

experiences.title: Reconnect and reinvigorate
experiences.text: Surrounded by beauty, the health and wellness facilities at Mākena will leave you feeling restored and relaxed.

residences_text: From beach cottages to hillside villas, our residences are inspired by their surroundings and give special attention to environmental, social, and economic sustainability.
